Howard Kiwata'S Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust, Fraud, Request For Immediate Suspension Of Trustee, Request To Remove Trustee, Request For S
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Franceschini, Esq., counsel for Richard Kiwata, Trustee (appearing by video conference).

At the outset, the Court queries counsel as to the purpose of the various errata filings concerning trust documentation as there appear to be three different versions of the trust instrument. Mr. Franceschini reports that the final and correct copy of the trust is attached to Errata No. 2 and that the correct date for the trust is January 7, 1998.
Mr. Franceschini reports that due to the inability of the current trustee [his client] to serve in that capacity, he has been unable to reach settlement with the City and County in the related civil case; hence, the request to suspend Richard Kiwata as Trustee and appoint Howard Kiwata to serve in his stead.

The Court will take the Petition under submission, indicating an inclination to grant the request to suspend Richard Kiwata as Trustee and appoint Howard Kiwata only. The remainder of the Petition will be continued to December 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for further status. Mr. Franceschini agrees with the same.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
